review_title: A Solid and user friendly solution
description: Gold-Vision has enabled us to consolidate various systems into a unified platform, resulting in improved efficiency and enhanced data visibility. The online chat support has proven invaluable allowing team members to proactively address any challenges they encounter. I wholeheartedly endorse Gold-Vision for anyone seeking a new CRM system. I must also mention the exceptional support provided by [sensitive content hidden] throughout the entire development process
author: Buket K.
pros: Gold-Vision CRM has been exceptionally well-received by all our users, and the reason is clear – its remarkable flexibility and power. The advantages of this system begin with the dedicated team behind it. With all departments collaborating and actively participating in its development, they prioritize meeting the genuine needs of users over simply chasing trends. As a result, Gold-Vision has evolved into a feature-rich CRM system over the years. Managing accounts and contacts is straightforward, and the clarity of opportunities is further enhanced by the ability to cross-reference them with other data points, ensuring all relevant stakeholders are included. Lead management is efficient, preventing duplication of efforts. What sets the system apart, however, is its robust search and filtering capabilities. This empowers users to quickly locate critical data, which can then be saved, streamlining repetitive tasks. Additionally, the system offers comprehensive reporting, presenting data through dynamic charts and graphs that are both user-friendly and allow for in-depth exploration.
cons: We've encountered a couple of minor bugs, but I'm confident they'll be resolved asap. I do find the system's interface a bit cluttered and less intuitive. Certain parts of the system can also be somewhat challenging to grasp but overall we are very pleased with it.

review_title: A CRM that can flex and fit to your companies needs.
description: Note only a great experience with the software but also with the team. Non pushy sales, understanding project managers, amazing training and a very knowledgeable support team.
author: Lee H.
pros: Gold-Vision CRM has had the same reaction with all users in our company. That is simply how flexible it is and how powerful it is. The pros start with the team behind it. All departments work together in the office and make sure they all get involved in areas of the product so they are making what the users need not what they think will be "cool". This means Gold-Vision is a system that has been built up over the year to be a fully featured CRM. Account/Contact Management is simple, Opportunities are clear and can be cross linked to any other aspect of the data so you can include all stakeholders in the process. Lead Management is clear and makes sure you don't double up with duplicates. The whole system though is driven with really powerful searching and filtering. So finding that single piece of data that is crucial to your process is fast and can be saved, making sure you can save time on repetitive tasks. You can report all data into a a range of charts and graphs, all dynamic and easy to drill down into. Applying the powerful filtering you can create lists for targeted marketing campaigns, quickly and easily. Then using the drag and drop template maker create stylish content templates. We also use a third party integration to track website visits. When you get stuck you have a number of options to the reach the support team and this is part of the price so no extra spend on something you may not need. A great help site and a range of quick and simple help videos.
cons: Honesty, haven't found anything yet that we found that is a Con. When we have had an issue with have found a workaround, or checked our workflow to see if we have been doing things a way that can be made better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Probably OK if you don't want to integrate with anything else and you have time and knowledge to filter out unneccesesary stuff and build your own dashboards.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Flexible and if you are IT savvy you can probably mostly build what you need. It does seem highly configurable if you know what you are doing which is probably a plus over other CRMS
cons: Doesnt integrate with many other apps and platforms. Completely lacking basic CRM functions like a visible sales pipeline. No automatic mail and contact tracking like for example Hubspot. If you want to integrate with anything basic like a 3CX phone system we found the support obstructive and they want to charge you.

description: What makes it so perfect as my marketing tool, is the integration of CRM with Connect e-marketing. Great CRM segmentation functionality, no exporting / importing of data to 3rd party e-marketing systems and no manipulation of data in Excel spreadsheets before I can send out a campaign! And, at the end of the day, the CRM is constantly updating the campaign data for reporting purposes and most importantly ensures our company remains GDPR compliant!
author: Bev W.
pros: Loved the system before but with the V8 upgrades which gives the CRM a new look and feel to menus and tool bars / views etc, it's even easier to use and without any detriment to its' already great functionality. Whether you need the system for pre-sales (leads), opportunities, marketing or something else, every screen is tailor-able making user input screens relatable and provides the facility to include terminology and fields more relevant to your business. I've worked with Gold-Vision CRM now for the last 8 years and still love using every bit of it!
cons: No 'cons' for me - we are happy with Gold-Vision

description: With Gold-Vision we have managed to amalgamate several systems into a single place improving our overall efficiency as well as the visibility of data.
author: Rob J.
pros: From the start, it was made very clear that we could customise the software to suit our requirements, of all the CRM systems we have used this is definitely the one that best suits our requirements. Best of all everything is very intuitive so training new staff members is very simple.
cons: The Sage plugin we use often takes far too long and it would be nice if we could automate this. We use the map view for a couple of lists and it would be nice if you could edit the records from this view.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great CRM tool with Great Customer Support
description: I am some what reticent to change any systems (bit of a tech dinosaur), however, once I was shown GV and got used to it, which didn't take long (and if I can use it, anyone can!) it is a great tool. Easy to customize the layout & fields with fab customers support from GV [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]. GV provides a LOT of functionality, most of which I personally won't/ don't need to use in my current role, however, I can see the immense benefits it will bring to the rest of the wider teams, our Division and parent company. Can't live with out it now :-)
author: Ross W.
pros: The level of detail it provides, from opportunity to project delivery is great and provides all the data I need to track opportunities and projects, coupled with easy to use reports. Customisable layouts/pages/widgets etc and various ways to get to the data you want, quickly.
cons: Some minor work rounds required and some process steps when entering certain data could be improved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Rachel D.
pros: The aesthetics, the ease of use and it is clear which step is next and I don't get frustrated working it out!
cons: I didnt like the initial data upload and cleansing the data before going into the system as the duplicates were a nightmare
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Gold Vision is super easy to use and is enabling the sales teams to update the system much quicker and easier than the previous CRM. data is more easy to visualise which is supporting and driving sales activities
author: Kim A.
pros: Super easy to use and configure for sales and account management activities. The reporting and dashboards are interactive and provide an easy way to see what is needed, quickly
cons: There are some basic features missing, such as copying or cloning opportunities and quotes and auto-updates that could be improved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: David S.
pros: GV delivers a sensibly priced solution that has been rapidly intergrated by our various teams very efficently. Flexible, transparent and simple to use are key attributes.
cons: The calendar functionality could be improved, along with better action point awareness.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: 7/10 - can be slow, sometimes over resourced. Im sure will improve as we get better at using and build to suit us
author: Robert W.
pros: [sensitive content hidden] was extremely helpful, hes a shining asset for your company.
cons: Not being able to add attachments to mailshots

review_title: 100% would recommend to businesses looking for a CRM system
author: Iona S.
pros: The CRM is flexible and easy to amend once it has been created. The training is key and very useful- for us we have had an amazing project manager [sensitive content hidden] that has support us with any questions and always answers us straight away. We are happy with the CRM so far and looking forward to continue to build the system to suit our business.
cons: We haven't found any cons with the CRM- anything that hasn't worked for us our project manager found a solution to it.

description: Our customer database is held and manged in Gold-Vision. We couldn't do without it.
author: Charlotte T.
pros: We have used Gold-Vision for 10 years now and like the fantastic support and the ease of use. The webinars are really useful and the online chat very good.
cons: We don't use Gold-Vision to it's full potential because of problems we have integrating with our Accounts system (Exchequer) and our Email provider (IBM Notes). The parts of Gold-Vision we are using are great.

description: Excellent, so easy to use as an admin and edition 8 is really intuitive for our users, who have given nothng but good feedback about the new UI. Support is excellent and there is always help at hand, plus all the Gold Vision contacts that I have are extremely helpful and friendly.
author: Donna L.
pros: There is so much scope for admministrators to learn and implement configuration themselves which makes it so much easier to tweak and personalise to the business.
cons: Some of the search functionality can jump about on the lists and it's a bit frustrating but I understand it is a bug that is undergoing a fix.

review_title: An excellent CRM system with fantastic customer support
description: 5* Experience. Implementing Gold Vision was probably the best business decision I've made in the last 12 months.
author: Andrew K.
pros: I have been using GV for around 12 months now and it has genuinely had a transformational impact on our business. The setup process (implementation and customization) was incredibly straightforward and led by GV's friendly team. We started seeing improved results almost instantly compared to previous solutions. Gold Vision CRM is now an integral part of our business operations and I would highly recommend it. Two best things about Gold Vision from our point of view; 1. Customer service is outstanding - The team is very responsive and great at helping us get the most out of the system 2. There is so much to discover - We are probably only using around 30% of the capability of the system right now and are getting huge value from it. There are so many facets to the system that you can constantly be unlocking new areas for better performance, automation and analysis.
cons: Haven't come across anything we are unhappy with yet.

description: We have been very pleased with the system and look forward to growing and developing the system over the coming years.
author: Kyle J.
pros: The ability to pick up a system that is very simple, intuitive and user friendly, coupled with sleek design and clear visuals, make for an excellent system to implement.
cons: Occasionally, the system can be a little inflexible when trying to manipulate data and produce reports.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Fantastic!
author: Poppy W.
pros: I love that we can customise everything to suit our needs. We use Eventbrite for our event registrations and it works seamlessly. The GDPR function is very handy for us
cons: I don't think anything needs to be improved

author: Ashley B.
pros: The ease of organising and understanding each teams workflow and tasks. The ability to oversee and review individuals work on an hourly basis is critical to the business and Gold Vision enables us to do that with ease and fluidity. We have found that the flexibility throughout the system is better than we have ever seen before and the integration and system updates are flawless.
cons: No issues with Gold Vision that affect our business growth and any minor issues have been resolved by their support team within a fair timescale and with complete professionalism

description: WE have used Gold-Vision for many years and the support function and team have always been very helpful which is much appreciated
author: Emma H.
pros: The ability and flexibility Gold-Vision offers to change screen design and add new fields is very helpful in the management of data
cons: Sometimes having multiple ways of doing the same thing can be difficult for new users as it isn't always intuitive

description: Good experience
author: Chris H.
pros: Easy to use and important for tracking customer information.
cons: Not that easy to create graphs. Does not allow percentage breakdowns on some graphs

description: Very good. I love the vast amounts of functions and features and the system is constantly getting updated and regular support.
author: Darryl M.
pros: Intuitive, easy to use and easy to get to grips with.
cons: Nothing really, it is all good when it comes to rich features and easy of use.

description: The abilities of the system are pretty impressive, it would seem to you can configure it to do pretty much whatever you need. Special mention to [sensitive content hidden] who has managed our implementation with a great deal of patience.
author: Kelly T.
pros: My favourite thing is the ability to configure most of the screens to suit your requirements.
cons: The harder bit of moving to GoldVision has been moving our current call logging process over as I think the system has been designed more as a CRM but we've got there
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great CRM system with an excellent team behind it
description: I've been working with GoldVision's CRM system since I joined Coffin Mew in 2008 and have knowledge of it from a user perspective within a team and now from a Marketing and Business Development perspective. The system is flexible, which allows the Marketing team to edit the platform to get the best use out of it without having to contact GoldVision. We use the system for recording all Marketing and Business Development activity including events, mailshots, campaign management and pipeline management. The GoldVision Connect mailshot system is intuitive to use and has a great HTML drag and drop function for creating professional looking mailshots. It also provides a good reporting function to get the best out of your campaigns. GoldVision also works well with other systems and can integrate Twitter, Facebook, Lead Forensics and EventBrite. I always find the team at GoldVision easy to work with, especially our account manager Jiggy. The support team are also quick to help with any questions about the system. I would be happy to recommend GoldVision.
author: Kirsty H.
pros: Easy to use Constant development Integration with other platforms

review_title: The most useful of business software
description: We have been using Gold Vision for many years now and are very happy with its functionality, we don't use all aspects of the software but do find the automatic email tracking and sorting to be fantastic and a real advantage. Having the ability to quickly search all of your colleagues emails to and from customers is so helpful. We currently have 427691 emails cross referenced and stored, MS Outlook struggles to give meaningful results with just a few thousand. The emails can be very quickly and easily searched using wild cards etc. Of course we use the contacts features with the usual company and phone details. Not only do our Sales Team use it to store customer information but also our Logistics Team use Gold Vision to store supplier information and track all suppliers emails. In fact all the teams across the business are using Gold Vision, it is wonderful tool and one I would recommend to any business small or large.
author: Phil Brown B.
pros: Easy to use. Email tracking quick and deals with huge volumes quickly and easily.
cons: Nothing, its really very good.

review_title: Gold-Vision CRM implementation at Servowatch Systems Ltd
description: The experience from first contact to last was exceptional. Everyone I came in contact with balanced professionalism with the personal touch. My account Manager took the time to understand my needs and wants before progressing to the discussion on features and benefits. By doing that he was able to tailor them to what I needed immediately making my decision very easy. The implementation went totally to plan from the initial contact through developing our instance of the software and the training of the sales managers. Very smooth process which was also completed to budget. The software is very intuitive to use and although I only needed minimal customisation it was very easy to do. Setting up alerts to warn of unwanted activity is also easy to achieve. I only have a small team but they are already seeing the benefits of having a professional CRM tool set (as opposed to a spreadsheet) and the CRM roadmap has development of lead management, customer issues log and integration of our web site as upcoming sub-projects. There are some minor shortcomings in the analytics area but I am looking forward to the next issue of the software due in the first half of 2017 to see what that brings and I'm optimistic that this will further develop on an excellent piece of software. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend Gold-Vision CRM to small, medium or large businesses. Andrew Burns Sales & Marketing Director Servowatch Systems Limited
author: Andrew B.
pros: Simple to configure to your businesses needs Very little customisation required Very cost effective solution Great company to deal with
cons: Some shortcomings in the reporting / dash boards but the next release of the software is due to address most of these
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Darren B.
pros: Gold-Vision allows us to manage our international customer database with great ease. Tracking emails is a great function also.
cons: The design function for E-newsletters could be better. It would be nice to have a little more scope.
